title: conyza khorassanica
intro: Conyza khorassanica, also known as Khorassan fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Conyza khorassanica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
